# vectorstore

```go
import "github.com/vaastav/agentic_blueprint/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore"
```

Package vectorstore provides in\-memory vector storage implementations. The InMemoryVectorStore is suitable for development and testing, but production deployments should use a persistent vector database.

### Wiring Spec Usage

```
rag_plugin.VectorStore[vectorstore.InMemoryVectorStore](spec, "my_vector_store")
```

This creates an InMemoryVectorStore named "my\_vector\_store". The store can then be used as the backing storage for a KnowledgeBase implementation.

The InMemoryVectorStore is safe for concurrent use as it uses mutexes when accessing the underlying vector map.

<a name="InMemoryVectorStore"></a>
## type [InMemoryVectorStore](<https://github.com/vaastav/dmas_forge/blob/main/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore/store.go#L32-L35>)

InMemoryVectorStore implements core.VectorStore using a thread\-safe in\-memory map. It uses cosine similarity for nearest\-neighbor queries.

```go
type InMemoryVectorStore struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewInMemoryVectorStore"></a>
### func [NewInMemoryVectorStore](<https://github.com/vaastav/dmas_forge/blob/main/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore/store.go#L38>)

```go
func NewInMemoryVectorStore(ctx context.Context) (*InMemoryVectorStore, error)
```

NewInMemoryStore creates a new empty in\-memory vector store.

<a name="InMemoryVectorStore.Delete"></a>
### func \(\*InMemoryVectorStore\) [Delete](<https://github.com/vaastav/dmas_forge/blob/main/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore/store.go#L98>)

```go
func (s *InMemoryVectorStore) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
```

Delete removes the vector with the given ID. No\-op if the ID does not exist.

<a name="InMemoryVectorStore.Query"></a>
### func \(\*InMemoryVectorStore\) [Query](<https://github.com/vaastav/dmas_forge/blob/main/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore/store.go#L58>)

```go
func (s *InMemoryVectorStore) Query(ctx context.Context, vector []float64, topK int) ([]core.VectorMatch, error)
```

Query returns the topK vectors most similar to the query vector, ranked by cosine similarity. Returns an empty slice if topK \<= 0 or if the query vector is zero\-length.

<a name="InMemoryVectorStore.Store"></a>
### func \(\*InMemoryVectorStore\) [Store](<https://github.com/vaastav/dmas_forge/blob/main/ai_runtime/plugins/vectorstore/store.go#L44>)

```go
func (s *InMemoryVectorStore) Store(ctx context.Context, id string, vector []float64, metadata map[string]any) error
```

Store saves a vector with its associated metadata under the given ID. If a vector with the same ID exists, it is overwritten.
